data.title: JPM stock slides, available in a buy zone. Trump looks to cap credit card interest rates, with JPMorgan reporting earnings Tuesday.
data.description: Shares of JPMorgan (JPM) declined within a favorable buying range as President Donald Trump proposed to limit credit card interest rates. JPMorgan is set to announce its earnings on Tuesday. Additionally, two leading banks exhibit positive chart patterns leading up to the launch of Q4.

data.title: Beam stock jumps 22% as FDA approves gene-editing drug BEAM-302. Exciting news for the company.
data.description: The Beam stock experienced significant growth on Monday following an agreement with the FDA regarding its gene-editing drug, BEAM-302. The stock surged by 22% as the FDA approved the company's ambitious gene-editing plan.

data.title: Nuvo releases AI-ready pregnancy dataset with maternal and fetal ECG data, providing deeper insights. AVENTURA, Fla., Jan. 12, 2026 - PRNewswire.
data.description: Cutting-edge longitudinal data set that includes native fetal and maternal ECG alongside phonocardiography is providing enhanced understanding of pregnancy health. Nuvo Intl Group Inc, headquartered in AVENTURA, Fla., announced on Jan. 12, 2026, their expertise in remote pregnancy monitoring and AI-driven maternal-fetal care. This unique dataset offers valuable insights and analysis into the health of pregnant individuals. The incorporation of various data streams ensures comprehensive monitoring, contributing to advancements in prenatal care.

data.title: Primis Financial Corp (NASDAQ: FRST) to release Q4 2025 results on Jan 29, 2026, after market close, with conference call.
data.description: Primis Financial Corp., traded as FRST on NASDAQ, is set to unveil its fourth quarter results for 2025 on January 29, 2026, following the market closure. The company, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, will conduct a conference call and audio session subsequent to the release.

data.title: Persistent corneal edema market to grow at 21.8% CAGR from 2025-2034, driven by clinical awareness and emerging therapies.
data.description: The market for persistent corneal edema is steadily increasing, fueled by factors like increased clinical understanding, enhanced postoperative supervision, and a growing emphasis on complications related to endothelial dysfunction. The introduction of new treatments like AURN001 (Aurion) has contributed to this growth. This sector has seen a significant rise in awareness and is currently showing promising growth potential.

data.title: 18 attorneys from Greenberg Traurig named to Denver's Top Lawyers 2026 list by 5280 magazine.
data.description: Denver, on January 12, 2026 - A notable achievement for Greenberg Traurig, LLP as eighteen of their attorneys have been included in 5280 magazine's Denver's Top Lawyers 2026 list. This exclusive recognition highlights the exceptional skill and expertise of these lawyers in the Mile High City and beyond. 5280 magazine is known for curating annual lists that showcase top professionals in different fields.

data.title: Three ETH price charts suggest a surge to $4K is imminent, driven by spot demand and futures market activity.
data.description: The recent surge in ETH's value was fueled by an increase in spot purchases and the responsible use of futures market leverage. This has positioned Ether for a possible continuation of its upward trajectory, with predictions pointing towards a potential move to $4,000.

data.title: Alamar Biosciences launches NULISAqpcr™ AD 5-plex Assay for Alzheimer's Disease research, on Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: A company based in Fremont, California, Alamar Biosciences, Inc. ("Alamar"), which specializes in precision proteomics for early disease detection, has revealed the introduction of its Research Use Only (RUO) NULISAqpcr™ AD 5-plex Assay on January 12, 2026. This new assay offers an innovative solution for research purposes and marks a significant advancement in the field.

data.title: NatGold extends token program to Feb 15 as reservations hit $355M; global demand surges, participation grows.
data.description: Miami-based company NatGold Digital Ltd. revealed on January 12, 2026, that their NatGold Token Pre-Market Reservation Program has seen a surge in participation numbers worldwide. The updated figures reflect a significant increase in demand, prompting the Company to extend the reservation period. The precise numbers were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: Jamf appoints David Helfer as Chief Revenue Officer, CRO effective immediately. Helfer brings global leadership experience to scale go-to-market teams.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Jamf (NASDAQ: JAMF) has appointed David Helfer as the new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Effective immediately, Helfer's background includes global leadership roles within tech companies, emphasizing expanding go-to-market teams and ensuring steady growth. With a proven track record in collaborating with channel partners, he is expected to lead a partner-focused approach. This move aims to enhance revenue strategies for managing and securing Apple products in the workplace.

data.title: Goodman Real Estate transitions leadership to support growth and vision. Effective Jan. 1, 2026.
data.description: Seattle-based Goodman Real Estate (GRE), a prominent multifamily real estate company, has revealed a strategic leadership transition aimed at facilitating its future expansion and vision. The change, which took effect on January 1st, 2026, involves the appointment of George to a key leadership role. George will play a crucial part in steering GRE through its upcoming growth phase.
ACER SAYS LAWSUITS SEEK COMPENSATION FOR CELLULAR FIRMS’ USE OF ACER TECHNOLOGY COVERED BY SIX U.S. PATENTS

data.title: Vitalik Buterin advocates for improved decentralized stablecoins to combat inflation, governance risks, and institutional control in crypto.
data.description: Vitalik Buterin has expressed concerns about the current dollar-pegged stablecoins, stating that they are exposing the crypto market to risks such as inflation, governance capture, and institutional control. His remarks highlight potential vulnerabilities in stablecoins linked to fiat currencies that could impact the stability and decentralization of the crypto ecosystem. This warning comes as stablecoins have grown in popularity and value, with a total market capitalization exceeding $100 billion, raising questions about their long-term sustainability and resilience in the face of external pressures. Buterin's critique underscores the need for innovation and careful consideration in the development and regulation of stablecoins to ensure the integrity of the broader cryptocurrency market.

data.title: DIRTT announces Rich Hunter's departure as President and COO and Aaron Merkin joining as new CTO on Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on January 12, 2026, DIRTT, a leading industrialized construction firm, revealed changes in its executive team. Rich Hunter, the former President and COO, has left the Company. Simultaneously, Aaron Merkin has been appointed as the new Chief Technology Officer. These changes are effective as of January 12, 2026.(DIRTT’s trading symbols: TSX: DRT; OTCQX: DRTTF)

data.title: Acer sues AT&T, Verizon, and T-Mobile for patent infringement in Texas court - claims companies used their technology.
data.description: A global technology manufacturer, Acer, has initiated individual patent infringement lawsuits against AT&T, Verizon, and T-Mobile. The legal actions were filed in the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Texas, citing violations of six U.S. patents related to pivotal advancements in cellular networking technology. Acer had previously engaged in licensing negotiations with the cellular companies but resorted to legal recourse on January 9. The lawsuits seek compensation for unauthorized utilization of Acer's patented technology.
